assumptions: The finite Level 2 protected coordinate block represents the three protected zero modes.
The formal sector-labeled kernel and finite coordinate block must be identified in the complete operator.
limitations: Finite-basis projector identities do not prove the infinite-dimensional complement split.
The full statement H = ker D_twist plus H_perp remains an index/domain proof obligation.

v1_3h_diagonal_mirror_update.claim: BHSM v1.3H audits the diagonal complement lower bound and mirror-mode exclusion conditions; it does not prove the full H_T theorem.
